title: panicum ciliatum var. pubescens
intro: Panicum ciliatum var. pubescens, also known as the hairy panic grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is believed to have various health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and alleviating fever. The hairy panic grass can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties, or it can be used to make topical applications such as salves and creams for skin issues. However, more research is needed to fully confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
